notes:
To get sound in videos please force usage of Proton 3.16-4 for this title and add 'SDL_AUDIODRIVER=winmm PULSE_LATENCY_MSEC=40 %command%'  as launch options
The external configuration tool does not work but you can just edit the 'config.ini' directly if you feel the need.
Game runs perfectly after these tweaks
title: The Night of the Rabbit
